_meta.finding: beta_gen approximately zero; vocabulary size drops out of generation law

beta_gen_test.interpretation: beta_gen=-0.008 is negligibly small; adding log(V-1) provides no improvement (Delta R2=0.0004)

interpretation: Despite V ranging from 32K to 152K, K_eff is approximately 2-3 across all architectures. This means next-token prediction is effectively a 2-3 way competition, not a V-way competition. Vocabulary size is therefore irrelevant to the generation law, confirming the Gumbel-race spontaneous sparsification prediction.
